name: Howellcorp Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Howellcorp is a Seattle-based fintech firm founded in 2011 by Nicholas Howell; launched LifeCounts personal financial management platform in Jan 2013. No school-bus operations identified; the registered address (100 S King St PMB 701, downtown Seattle) is a private mailbox.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. Howellcorp is a personal-finance fintech, not a school-bus contractor. The 'Which Will Do Bus' suffix appears to be a list-build artifact. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: Travelers Transit
districts_or_customers: Woonsocket-area / RI statewide student transportation program (likely)
recent_news: Travelers' Transit, Inc. has operated from 664 Front St, Woonsocket since 1983 under principal William R. Legare; Indeed reviews confirm school-bus driver roles (AM/PM student runs) and wheelchair-securement training, consistent with school and special-needs transport. Sister/d/b/a listing 'Valley Transportation' appears at same address.
fit_notes: Plausible Summit tuck-in: 40+ year family-owned RI operator (~70 employees, ~$2.7M est. revenue) running yellow school + wheelchair-equipped special-needs routes in northern RI / Blackstone Valley. Founder-led since 1983 suggests potential succession opening; small fleet limits scale but fits Northeast bolt-on geography.

name: Carrot Inc Which Will Do Bus
owner_or_parent: Carrot Fertility, Inc. (VC-backed; CRV, Tiger Global, etc.)
recent_news: Carrot Fertility, Inc. is a venture-backed global fertility-benefits platform for employers (founded 2015, Menlo Park/distributed). 1600 Seaport Blvd Redwood City is a generic Bay Area office park; the company does not operate school buses.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. Carrot Inc. is a fertility-benefits SaaS company, not a school-bus operator. List entry is a false positive from address-based scraping. Exclude.

name: Hadco Corp Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Hadco Corporation was a printed-circuit-board manufacturer (Salem, NH) acquired by Sanmina for ~$1.3B in 2000; 2700 N 1st St, San Jose is Sanmina-SCI's HQ address, where Hadco appears as a subsidiary licensee. No school-bus activity.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target. Hadco is a PCB/electronics-manufacturing subsidiary of public co. Sanmina-SCI, not a school-bus operator. Exclude.

name: Ashley School Bus Svc
recent_news: No public web presence (no website, no media coverage, no district-contract listings) located for Ashley School Bus Svc at 3330 Lightstar Dr, Houston. Listed owner Pedro Ballinas Ramirez. South-Houston address is in an industrial/warehouse corridor consistent with a small bus yard but cannot be independently confirmed.
fit_notes: Possible micro-operator tuck-in if confirmed: ~47 employees / ~$2.6M est. revenue would imply a small Houston-area yellow-bus or contract-routes operator under sole proprietor. Lack of any digital footprint suggests very small, owner-operated; would require ground-truth (Texas DMV motor-carrier search, HISD/Aldine/Alief vendor lists) before outreach. Low conviction.
